title: Password Reset
content: Users can reset their password from Settings > Security by clicking on 'Reset Password'. You will receive an email with instructions.

title: Account Creation
content: Users can create an account by clicking the 'Sign Up' button on the main homepage. You need a valid email and a 8-character password.

title: API Rate Limits
content: The standard API rate limit is 100 requests per minute. For enterprise users, the rate limit is upgraded to 1000 requests per minute.

title: Billing Cycle
content: Invoices are generated on the 1st of every month. Payments are automatically deducted or due within 15 days of invoice generation.

title: Support Availability
content: Customer support is available 24/7 for Enterprise users. For standard users, support operates from 9 AM to 5 PM EST, Monday through Friday.
